top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: REalloys raises $100M via institutional placement
top_signals.summary: The $100 million share offering, expected to close on June 26, would provide working capital moving forward, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hemlo boosts M&I resources 34% at Ontario gold mine
top_signals.summary: The resource update “reinforces our thesis of unlocking value through reinvestment,” TD Securities mining analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
